scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm run build && pnpm run --include-workspace-root --workspace=../.. lint
scripts.build:prepare: shx mkdir -p ./syntaxes/ && shx cp -f ../language/syntaxes/ott.tmLanguage.json ./syntaxes/ott.tmLanguage.json && shx cp -f ../../assets/icon.png ./icon.png
scripts.build: pnpm run build:prepare && tsc -b tsconfig.json && node esbuild.mjs
scripts.build:clean: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
scripts.watch: pnpm run build:prepare && concurrently -n tsc,esbuild -c blue,yellow "tsc -b tsconfig.json --watch" "node esbuild.mjs --watch"
